ListInstance.Title: Categories
ListInstance.Description: Categories used by the DMS UI

ListInstance.Title: Templates
ListInstance.Description: Template documents used by the DMS UI

ListInstance.Title: DMS Documents
ListInstance.Description: Document library used by the DMS UI

ListInstance.Title: CTD Folders
ListInstance.Description: CTD folder hierarchy used by the DMS UI

Row.Field: 5.2 Tabular Listing of All Clinical Studies
5.3.5 Reports of Efficacy and Safety Studies
5.3.7 Case Report Forms and Individual Patient Listings

ListInstance.Title: Countries
ListInstance.Description: Country master list used in Create Document and Drugs Database UI

ListInstance.Title: Drugs Database
ListInstance.Description: Drugs master data used by the DMS UI

Row.Field: Covers governance documents including Directives, Guidelines, Policies and Quality Manuals that govern facility operations, IT, purchasing, QA, QC, safety, and validation.
Master Batch Records (MBR) containing master production instructions for each product. Defines the manufacturing process, materials, equipment, and controls.

Method documents for General Methods (calibration, engineering, equipment, test), Material Methods (excipient, packaging, raw material), Product Methods (cleaning, labeling, packaging), and Substance Methods.
Quality documents covering Product Quality (analytical development, annual product review, formulation) and Substance Quality records.
Specification documents for General, Material (excipient, packaging, raw material, reference standard), Product (cleaning, intermediate, labeling, packaging), and Substance specifications.
Equipment Validation documents including Master Validation Plans (MVPs) and Executed Validation Protocols (EVPs) for all manufacturing equipment.
Material Validation documents including Master Validation Plans and Executed Validation Protocols for materials used in manufacturing.
Product Validation documents including Master Validation Plans and Executed Validation Protocols for finished dosage form products.
Substance Validation documents including Master Validation Plans and Executed Validation Protocols for drug substances (APIs).
System Validation documents including Master Validation Plans and Executed Validation Protocols for computerised systems (CSV), LIMS, ERP, and manufacturing software.

ListInstance.Title: Mappings
ListInstance.Description: Mappings between GMP models and eCTD sections

ListInstance.Title: eSignature
ListInstance.Description: Adobe Sign signature requests. Power Automate Flow 1 reads Pending items and sends to Adobe Sign. Flow 2 updates status to Signed on completion.

ListInstance.Title: TMF Folders
ListInstance.Description: TMF folder hierarchy based on DIA TMF Reference Model 3.3.1

Row.Field: To describe how records for the trial will be managed and stored during and after the trial
To describe overall strategy for timelines, management and conduct of the trial
To describe operational techniques and activities undertaken within the quality management system
List of SOPs Current During Trial
List of SOPs Current During Trial
To document which standard operating procedures were in effect for the trial
To describe how monitoring will be implemented during the trial
To describe potential hazards associated with the trial
To define trial roles, contact details and structure of trial team
To document qualifications and eligibility of sponsor trial team members
To describe purpose and mode of operation of Independent Trial Committee
To document agreement of trial requirements with Committee Member
Agenda, presentation materials for trial kick-off meeting
Agenda, presentation materials for investigator meetings
To provide relevant clinical and non-clinical data on investigational product
To describe objective, design, methodology, statistical considerations
Subsequent versions of original protocol or formal clarification
Blank forms/templates to capture data points of protocol
To document appropriate written information given to subjects
Materials used in clinical trial recruitment campaigns
To describe final or interim results and interpretation of trial
To present relevant top line findings of bioanalytical aspects
Set of documents submitted to regulatory agencies requesting approval
Documented notification received from regulatory authority
Documentation related to registration in public registries
Application for license to import/export investigational product
Document issued by government authorizing importation/exportation
Notification of Safety or Trial Information
Notification of Safety or Trial Information
Notification to Regulatory Authorities of trial events
Reports concerning trial conduct, progress and status
Zone 4 - IRB or IEC and other Approvals
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
Documents describing trial submitted to IRB/IEC for approval
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
Documentation received from IRB/IEC indicating decision
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
Documentation that IRB/IEC has reasonable number of qualified members
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
Documentation that IRB/IEC performs according to written procedures
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
IRB or IEC and other Approvals
Documents submitted to committee other than IRB/IEC for approval
